heading: Try an Example for Indexing Array Elements
body:
The following index definition example uses the sample\_mflix.movies
collection. If you have the [Load Sample Data Into Atlas](sample-data) already
loaded on your cluster, you can use the Visual Editor or JSON (Javascript Object Notation) Editor
in the Atlas UI to configure the index. After you select your
preferred configuration method, select the database and collection,
and refine your index to add field mappings.

The following index definition indexes the `genres` field, which
contains an array of string values.

Visual Editor

JSON Editor
